description: Letter of recommendation. In Judaeo-Arabic. Written on behalf of the bearer, Abū l-ʿIzz b. Abū Saʿīd. Apart from the conventional material, we learn that the recommendee has been working since Purim as a slaughterer, "one or two heads a day," in order to conceal his face from having to ask or having to ashame himself before the congregation (wa-lā yanfaḍiḥ ʿind al-qahal). It seems that he now wants to make a pilgrimage to Jerusalem. Possibly in the same handwriting: CUL Or.1080 J158 (PGPID 19788) and ENA NS 34.21 (PGPID 12101).
description_he: מכתב המלצה. ביהודית-ערבית. בשם הנושא אבו אל-עז בן אבו סעיד. מאז פורים עובד כשוחט 'ראש-שניים ביום' כדי לא לבייש עצמו בפני הקהל. מבקש לעלות לרגל לירושלים.
